changes.description: Add assertion generation for data-local and data-global questions with optional validation
Add benchmark-qed agentic skills with interactive configuration wizard and best practices
Add data-linked question generation with bridge, comparison, intersection, and temporal question types
Add hierarchical assertion scoring with support for comparing multiple RAG methods, clustered permutation significance tests, and supporting assertions tracking
Add retrieval metrics evaluation pipeline with CLI, caching, TVD metric, and significance testing
Add type-checking to Jupyter Notebooks, update Pyright
Bug fixes, ruff lint/format cleanup, and pyright type annotation compliance
fix: use bool() instead of identity check for question validation pass field
